meta.title: What Is A Critical Service? A Hierarchy Of Needs
meta.description: Munish Walther-Puri had a front row seat to critical infrastructure security and incident response as the Director of Cyber Risk for New York City's Cyber Command. He discussed key questions such as what outage would you notice first? and what type of outage would have a lasting impact? And this leads to four key challenges he saw in trying to help a city work through this exercise. A lot of these lessons are applicable to other cities, states, regions and even some large companies.
